facts.primaryTitle: Her Father Disappeared Inside the Dollhouse
facts.setting: Every room in Mara's dollhouse matched her home.
criticalEvents: Every room in Mara's dollhouse matched her home.
Then a new miniature figure appeared inside it—wearing her father's clothes.
Mara Vale was a twelve-year-old girl whose father restores antique furniture when the story began in a decaying Victorian townhouse inherited by a young family.
The first reports did not describe an obvious monster or violent attack.
facts.threat: Every room in Mara's dollhouse matched her home.
facts.primaryReveal: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.finalConsequence: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.unresolvedQuestion: Did Mara Vale defeat the thing at the centre of the story, or did the encounter simply teach it how to remain hidden?
